title: [AI slop] Polymer Patch for Guard Villagers
description: Polymer Patch for [AI slop] Guard Villagers made 99% by AI
body:
Polymer Patch for [AI slop] Guard Villagers made 99% by AI.

This mod requires original one to to function properly, check [**here**](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt))

Another Polymer patch for another mod. Don't know what is Polymer? See [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer).

It **REQUIRES TWO FILES** to function properly, you must download manually.

Because of this is an AI slop, I won't be posting the source code.
